items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag. To celebrate the 70th anniversary of the classic Horsebit element, the new series reinterprets the Horsebit element, cleverly incorporating dazzling crystal outer rings. This small shoulder bag is crafted from black leather with elegant and charming new elements such as crystal Horsebit, showcasing a modern temperament. Black leather, gold-tone crystal accessories, cotton-linen blend lining, front detail with Horsebit, top handle, detachable leather shoulder strap (20cm high); detachable chain shoulder strap with interlocking double G (52cm high). Weight: approx. 0.7kg.

items.name_en: 💖《 packaging》💖Ophidia series GG mini tote bag. The Ophidia series reinterprets new sizes and styles, integrating the handle and shoulder strap for versatile carrying experiences. This tote bag is crafted from beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, featuring iconic double G accessories that add charm to the overall look. Beige and ebony GG Supreme canvas, black leather trim, gold-tone hardware. As a selected item with a Gucci Tag, this product supports NFC technology for a digital innovation experience. Cotton-linen blend lining with double G, handle (12cm high), shoulder strap (28.5cm high).

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original boutique packaging》💖【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, adding color to the leather accessories as always. This Original GG canvas card holder features this 1970s style motif in a luxurious way, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details, showcasing elegant taste. The interior is carefully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
items.name_cn:
💖《Complete with original boutique packaging》💖【New】The circular interlocking double-G motif draws inspiration from the brand's heritage elements, adding color to the leather accessories as always. This Original GG canvas card holder features this 1970s style motif in a luxurious way, contrasting with the contrasting stitching details, showcasing elegant taste. The interior is carefully designed with multiple compartments for various uses.
Beige and dark brown Original GG canvas
Brown leather trim with contrasting stitching
Taffeta lining
Circular interlocking double-G details
Interior: card slots, 1 coin pocket
Snap closure
Model: 818811.
Open dimensions: 22cm (W) x 9cm (H); Closed dimensions: 11cm (W) x 9cm (H)
Weight: approx. 80g
Color: Apricot canvas brown/Original leather.
Made in Italy

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. The brand's classic design details are reinterpreted every season, writing a new chapter for the brand's long design heritage. This card holder is crafted in black leather, featuring the classic double-G motif from the 1970s. Brown leather, gold-tone hardware, viscose lining, double-G logo, 6 card slots, 1 zip pocket.

items.name_en: 💖《Complete with original green box packaging》💖GG Marmont Card Holder. This GG Marmont card holder is crafted in classic, durable black leather, adding a classic piece to the 《Aria- 》 collection. The double-G hardware reinterprets the 1970s belt buckle design in matching resin material. The combination of classic design and monochrome colorway highlights a modern fashion style.

items.name_en: 💖《Full Original Green Box Packaging》💖Aphrodite Small Shoulder Bag. Gucci explores the path of craftsmanship with modern design aesthetics, cleverly blending classic brand elements with beloved brand icons. This small shoulder bag features ample space, crafted from black soft leather, with a striking double-G logo on the closure. Black soft leather, black enamel brass hardware with ceramic finish, microfiber lining, inside: one zip pocket, adjustable shoulder strap (30cm high) with double-G magnetic snap, weight: approx. 0.35kg.
